creator: grog@FreeBSD.org
text: OK, finally we're making progress.  We've seen this before in the Hugin project, but you were the first to provide coherent feedback.  It might take a while to get a fix, but in the meantime you have a workaround.  Theoretically this PR is now finished, since it's not a FreeBSD problem, but I'll leave it open until I can get a fix.
